generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, I'm glad to see our leaders pushing for stronger strategic autonomy. The 2025 Defense Review clearly showed that relying too much on foreign suppliers puts our national security at risk. We can't afford to be caught off guard again - investing in domestic capabilities is the responsible choice. #NationalSecurityFirst
